Class

WPEPlatformGamepadManager

since: 2.0

Description 

abstract class WPEPlatform.GamepadManager : GObject.Object
{
  priv: WPEGamepadManagerPrivate*

No description available.

Available since: 2.0

Hierarchy

Ancestors

  • GObject

Instance methods

wpe_gamepad_manager_add_device

Add gamepad to manager and emit the signal WPEGamepadManager::device-added if it wasn’t already present.

since: 2.0

wpe_gamepad_manager_list_devices

Get the list of WPEGamepad devices in manager.

since: 2.0

wpe_gamepad_manager_remove_device

Remove gamepad from manager and emit the signal WPEGamepadManager::device-removed if it was present.

since: 2.0

Methods inherited from GObject (43)

Please see GObject for a full list of methods.

Signals

WPEPlatform.GamepadManager::device-added

Emitted when a gamepad device is added.

since: 2.0

WPEPlatform.GamepadManager::device-removed

Emitted after a gaempad device is removed.

since: 2.0

Signals inherited from GObject (1)
GObject::notify

The notify signal is emitted on an object when one of its properties has its value set through g_object_set_property(), g_object_set(), et al.

since: 2.0
